properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As a child so foolishly I turned God away Not knowing the heartache a sinner must face But God in His goodness Has let me return To share with His children the lesson I learnt

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O the blood, the blood, it covered it all Love has no boundaries sins debt paid in full Jesus knew in the beginning that man would surely fall I'm glad my savior's precious blood covered it all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Have you ever tried to measure just one sin Seeking forgiveness when your heart knows within Our God will not judge us on how big or how small He looks for Calvary's blood to cover it all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Try to imagine how this miracle took place Love beyond measure our God's amazing grace Sometimes when we're weary we might stumble and fall But just one drop of his precious blood it covered it all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: BRIDGE: Jesus knew, in the beginning that man would surely fall I'm glad my savior's precious blood (Yes it was his precious blood) Covered it all Covered it all
